description: Fast lookup index for operational and execution logs. Tracks agent runs, LLM calls, state changes.

log_types.agent-execution: Track when agents run: start time, duration, result
log_types.llm-calls: Track all LLM API calls: model, tokens, cost, response quality
log_types.state-mutations: Track all NEXUS state changes: what changed, why, by whom
log_types.errors: Track non-fault errors: validation failures, timeouts, retries

schema.log_type: One of: agent-execution, llm-calls, state-mutations, errors
schema.tokens_used: For LLM calls: input + output tokens
schema.cost_usd: For LLM calls: cost of the call

files.agent-execution.jsonl: One JSON object per line, newline-delimited
files.llm-calls.jsonl: One JSON object per line, newline-delimited
files.state-mutations.jsonl: One JSON object per line, newline-delimited
files.errors.jsonl: One JSON object per line, newline-delimited

note: JSONL format (JSON Lines) for efficient streaming queries. Use fast line-based indexing.
